overview:
## Discussion

Setting this property will override the single format value set by [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVBuffer/CreationAttributes/pixelFormatType] and vice-versa. # pixelFormatTypes

**Instance Property**

Allow multiple pixel formats to be specified in attributes

## Declaration

```swift
var pixelFormatTypes: [CVPixelFormatType]? { get set }
```

## Discussion

Setting this property will override the single format value set by [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVBuffer/CreationAttributes/pixelFormatType] and vice-versa. When accessing [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVBuffer/CreationAttributes/pixelFormatType], only the first value is used if multiple format values are set. Do not set this value to an empty array.
title: pixelFormatTypes
